titleStmt.title: SII 38.449: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 449. (A.R. No. 449 of 1912.) KŌṬṬŪR, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine Koḻundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājādhirāja (II) who captured Madurai and Īḻam. Year: 13, KaṟkaTaka, śu. 6 Tuesday, Anusha = 29th July 1175 A.D. Error su. 6 for śu. 9.
p.note: The striking feature of this record is the date. Whereas in all the records of this king, which supply details of the date each set of those details is found to be capable of being equated to two dates in the Christian era, as the basis of assuming his initial year of reign either as 1163 or as 1166 A.D., But in the present case, the details date match with 1163 A.D. as the date of accession of Rājādhirāja II.

summary.p: Records that the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the Koḻundāṇḍār temple at Koṭṭūr in Nenmali-nāḍu in Rājēndrasōḷa-vaḷanāḍu, Kāśyapaṉ Muḍikoṇḍāṉ Duṟgaiyāṉ Śivolōkanāyaka Bhaṭṭaṉ, Taruṇēndraśēkaraṉ Sundara Bhaṭṭaṉ, Sōmadēva Bhaṭṭanambi alias Aviṉāśī Bhaṭṭaṉ and others received two hundred and sixty-five kāśu from Suḷḷaṅkuḍaiyāṉ Tillaināyagaṉ of Suḷḷaṅkuḍi in Āvūr-kūṟṟam (a sub-division) of Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu for burning perpetual lamps to the god of the above temple. It is also recorded that they agreed to burn two lamps with one ūri of oil, accrued as interest daily. Further the donor also gifted two brass lampstands for the above purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ madhuraiyumThe Grantha letter dhu is engraved � while the ṭamil letter ‘yu’ is�Īḻamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīrājādhirājadevarkku
yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu kaṟkaṭakaṉāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum cevvākkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa A
niḻattiṉāḷ rājendracoḻavaḷaṉāṭṭu neṉmaliṉāṭṭuk koṭṭur Uṭaiyār koḻuṉtāṇṭār
koyil kāṇiyuṭaiya civabrāhmaṇar kāśyapaṉ muṭikoṇṭāṉ tuṟkaiyāṉ civalokaṉāya
ka bhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭomum taruṇendracekaraṉ sundrabhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭomum somadeva ṉampiyāna
Aviṉāci paṭṭaṉum bha ṭaiyā nampiyān mātaru kaṉappaṭṭaṉum yaṉ Āḷkoṇṭā
yāṉ tiruvā kkālaketipaṭṭaṉum yicāṉa Āḷavan=tāṉ tiyākaviṉotapaṭṭaṉum tiricci
ṟṟam palamuṭaiyāṉāna Āvantevaṉum Ivaṉ tampi tevaṉum roti tirumulaṭṭāṉāmuṭaiya
ṉāṉa koṭaiṉāyakapaṭṭaṉum kavuciyaṉ tirumulaṭṭāṉamuṭaiyaār ṉāyakaṉāṉa maṅkalaṉāyakapaṭṭaṉum pullāli
somadevaṉampiyāṉa tillaiyāḷibhaṭṭaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom nittaviṉotavaḷaṉāṭṭu
Āvūṟkūṟṟattu cuḷḷaṅkuṭic cuḷḷaṅkuṭaiyāṉ tillaiṉāyakaṉ � yāṉ pakkal ṉāṅkaḷ Uṭaiyā
rku tiruṉāṉtā viḷakkerikka Upaiyamākakkaikkoṇṭa kācu Iruṉūṟṟaṟu pattañcu Ikkācu Iruṉūṟṟa
ṟupattañcum Eṅkaḷil yar pāti kaikkoṇṭu I �l vanta policaikku nit
tam Uriy Eṇṇai koṇṭu ṉ tiruṉoṉtāviḷakku 2 Ivviraṇṭum candrādittavaṟ Erikka kaṭai
vomāṉom Ivvaṉaivom Ittiruṉoṉtāviḷakku pitta ḷaikkutti viḷakku 2 ṉā
l Iṭai Āyirattu Eṇ palam . §
Digital edition of SII 38.449 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
